details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

about_item: Size: 17" L x 9" W x 11.5" H. Compliant with most Airlines and best suited for kittens, puppies, teacup breeds and ferrent smaller than 8 pounds. All dimensions are measured manually, please allow deviation of 1 inch.(Tip: please measure your pet before purchase and choose the right size for your pet, better for small breeds pets !)
The safety belt loop allows the carrier to be restrained with a vehicle seat belt for car travel. Made with durable material
A small zipper opening at the top of the carrier that allows you to quickly unzip and reach into the bag to access your pet

A mesh pocket on the side gives you a place to keep essentials for your pet, such as a leash or snacks. Half zip opening on one end, full zip opening on the other end and added mesh panels allow maximum accessibility and ventilation for your pet

WHATS MORE: This Pet Carrier comes with a removable pad for comfort and easy cleaning. Storage space so you can treat your pet while on the go. Adjustable shoulder strap so you can adjust to your perfect fit. This carrier is great for AIRLINE TRAVEL designed to fit under your seat

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier to be a quality piece of luggage that fits perfectly under airline seats and is easy to carry through airports. They appreciate its comfort, with one customer noting the soft pad included for pets, and its appearance, with one mentioning it looks expensive. Customers like the pockets, with one highlighting the storage room for food. The size and sturdiness receive mixed feedback - while some find it perfect for small dogs, others say it's too small, and while some describe it as sturdy, others find it flimsy.

authors_reviews.title: Hands Down The BEST Carrier
authors_reviews.text: I have small dogs and I do animal rescue work, finding them new homes. My work often involves airplane travel so I own several pet carriers.I’m writing a detailed review for this carrier because it’s hands down the most well thought out, helpful, versatile, pet friendly carrier out there and I’ll tell you why:• When you put an animal in a small container their body heat is trapped into a small space and they can quickly overheat. This carrier is vented on every side which made my dog so much more comfortable. The other bonus is that the vents allow the pet to see out of the carrier which in return makes the animal much calmer.•padded shoulder strap: This is great because again, it’s another option that allows the carrier to be carried over the shoulder. It also has a zipper on one side which allows the carrier to safely slide over the handle of the suitcase.• inside one of the pockets is a little attached key ring. This is a great place to attach a laminated card with your pets info.•Thin washable pad: I can’t stress enough how a thin pad was nicer than the thick pad. The biggest challenge (when flying) is how hot a pet can get in a carrier then stowed under the airplane seat a thick pad just adds to the heat and is really unneccesary. The thin pad allowed for more interior space yet is still soft and cozy.•reflective strips on the end of the carrier, again yet another cool detail they added for increased visibility and safety for your pet.•another side zippered storage pocket. I used this to store a portable water bowl and poo poo 💩 bags and wipes in case my doggie has an accident.•See my photos, you can see how this carrier fit my 6 month old chihuahua.
authors_reviews.author: Robyn Maria-Jo

authors_reviews.title: Nicely made
authors_reviews.text: Very nice. Good size and well made. Doesn’t collapse in on itself.And so far the clever kitty who likes to use her toes like fingers hasn’t managed to escape from it. Previous bags did not manage this feat. She has previously opened zippers, snaps, Velcro, and even worked a buttoned flap loose.
authors_reviews.author: Amanda

authors_reviews.title: Tested On A Recent Trip To Mexico
authors_reviews.text: My dog is small and as you can see he has plenty of room. I got the largest size for that reason. I did initially buy the smaller one but decided since he is a puppy there might still be room to grow. I love this bag. I travel a lot with my dogs (retired airline employee) and want a good lightweight bag. I have used Sherpa and Kugro backpacks (LOVE) but recently a gate agent wouldn't let me go on board with my lovable Kurgo backpack. She didn't think it had enough air holes (I beg to differ but what can you do?) So I was on the hunt for a bag that would work for all gate agents! Here are some of the features I love best....1. You can slip it over a bag! I had a Sherpa bag originally that was twice the price but junk when it came to slipping it over your roller bag. The strap was too thin and it kept spinning around. This one has a wide strap that actually has velcro below so you you don't have to use it as a roller bag strap but as an extra pocket. It still spins around but no where near like the Sherpa. I think it would be helpful it wasn't so wide. Just monitor while using it and you will be fine.2. Love the peep hole on the side. It's just enough that he can poke his head out. He loved it as well.3. Good height and soft enough that it still fits under an airplane seat.4. Just enough pockets to make it useful.5. Nice shoulder strap and carries well.6. Plenty of room for my 10lb dog that is 12in long.Over all, a good bag. I might buy more for my other dog that travels with us as well.
authors_reviews.author: Vicky T.

authors_reviews.title: Pretty good carrier
authors_reviews.text: Pretty durable although my cat was able to unzip after multiple back to back attempts. This was after multiple hours on a plane though which I do not plane on doing again and it didn’t damage the carrier in any way I just think I forgot to zip it all the way and she wore it down. But other than that no complaints. The mesh really is anti scratch and this carrier works great for TSA
authors_reviews.author: Dershay

authors_reviews.title: Great for tiny pups
authors_reviews.text: Great little carrier for my tiny 5 lb chihuahua. Fits well under airline seats if needed, but roomy enough inside for her to move around. Folds up well for storage and easy to clean. So cute! I’ve had several compliments of this carrier when traveling with my baby.
authors_reviews.author: Bambi

authors_reviews.title: Great carrier - fit perfectly under American Airlines seat
authors_reviews.text: Did my Kitty enjoy riding in this carrier? Definitely not. But she was comfortable, it felt sturdy and secure and she had plenty of room. It is well made. It fit perfectly under the seat on our American Airlines flight from Colorado to Florida for a relocation move. It was easy to carry through the airport and easy to help her in and out. Plenty of mesh windows for air circulation. I doubt she will ever need to fly again but if she does, we would be happy to use this carrier again.
authors_reviews.author: Michelle S

authors_reviews.title: Ok for short/day trips
authors_reviews.text: Carrier is ok for short/day trips. Fits under seat of plane without problem. There is little to no padding for comfort. I added an old shirt for padding. My dog is a 12lb poodle. He was able to turn around inside the carrier and stand with head bent. Carrier didn't really feel sturdy but was. It has pockets for food, leash, waste bags and inside hook for collar to prevent escape and has pocket you can zip & unzip to place on luggage as well as loops to secure in a vehicle. Plenty of ventilation for your pet. I would have given this product higher rating but due to the feel of it feeling not very sturdy & lack of padding; I'm rating it average.
authors_reviews.author: A_Marie

authors_reviews.title: My cats love this
authors_reviews.text: Good sized carrier, easy to clean, good quality, cats didn't make a fuss in it - they could see everything around them, which helped to calm them down.
authors_reviews.author: saazi
